name: healthcare_ethics_ransomware_incident_southport_auto_ben
premise: A regional manager wants an exception to policy; compliance says any carve-out must be written, time-limited, and auditable. In Healthcare Ethics, the situation tagged internally around healthcare ethics ransomware incident southport auto ben has converged with local pressure in the Southport corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. A union or patient advocate group is on the line demanding a written commitment before the next operational shift. Legal has not signed off on data sharing between teams; analysts are inferring causality from incomplete joins. Shift change is imminent; handoff cannot proceed without a signed disposition because liability follows the signatory line. No option cleanly satisfies both autonomy and beneficence; the least-wrong path requires naming who absorbs downside if the bet is wrong.

agents.name: Arjun Mensah
agents.identity: I am Arjun Mensah, the incident lead whose name will appear on the after-action report in Healthcare Ethics. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat beneficence as disposable collateral every time autonomy spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Talia Vasquez
agents.identity: I am Talia Vasquez, the field counterpart whose constituency will feel the decision first in Healthcare Ethics. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so autonomy cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes beneficence in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will insist on verified facts before external commitments, split comms into facts versus hypotheses, and accept delay cost to protect integrity aligned with beneficence.
I will align public messaging with operational necessity now and correct later if needed—accepting reputational and trust risk to beneficence to preserve operational autonomy.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Two incompatible drafts are circulating; only one can become official. Arjun Mensah must choose under autonomy versus beneficence. What does Arjun Mensah do?
